name: platform-policy-console
description: Monorepo for a GitHub webhook powered platform policy console.

scripts.build:policy-worker: mkdir -p dist && docker build --output type=local,dest=dist -f Dockerfile.policy-worker .
scripts.deploy:ui: aws s3 sync apps/ui/dist s3://$(terraform -chdir=infra output -raw ui_bucket_name) --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(terraform -chdir=infra output -raw ui_cloudfront_distribution_id) --paths '/*'
